debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
hf : UnifContOn f (Set.Icc a b)
ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε
δ : ℝ
hδ₁ : δ > 0
hδ₂ : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε / (2 * (b - a))
N : ℕ
hN : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < ↑N
n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
m : ℕ
hnm : m ≥ n
pos1 : 0 < 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))
NposR : 0 < ↑N
Npos : 0 < N
npos : 0 < n
mpos : 0 < m
⊢ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ

failed_attempts:
rw [one_div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound)]
  rw [mul_comm]
  rw [← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
  apply lt_of_lt_of_le hN
  norm_cast
  exact hn

rw [one_div_div] at hN
  have : 2 * (b - a) / δ < n := lt_of_lt_of_le hN (by bound)
  rwa [div_lt_iff (by bound), mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]

rw [div_div] at hN
  have : 2 * (b - a) / δ < n := lt_of_lt_of_le hN (by exact_mod_cast hn)
  rwa [div_lt_iff (by bound), mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]

rw [div_div, div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound)]
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le hN (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (Nat.cast_le.mpr hn) (le_of_lt hδ₁))

rw [div_div, div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast npos)]
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le hN (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (Nat.cast_le.mpr hn) hδ₁.le)

rw [div_div, one_mul] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast npos), mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
  linarith

rw [div_div, div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound), mul_comm δ]
  apply lt_of_lt_of_le hN
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (Nat.cast_le.2 hn) hδ₁.le

field_simp at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound), mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
  linarith

rw [div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound)]
  calc
    2 * (b - a) < N * δ := (div_lt_iff hδ₁).mp hN
    _ ≤ n * δ := by
      rw [mul_comm N, mul_comm n]
      apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (by exact_mod_cast hn) (le_of_lt hδ₁)

rw [one_div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound), mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le hN (by exact_mod_cast hn)

rw [one_div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast npos), mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le hN (Nat.cast_le.mpr hn)

rw [div_div_eq_mul_div, one_mul] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound), mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le hN (Nat.cast_le.mpr hn)

rw [one_div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast npos)]
  rw [div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  calc 2 * (b - a)
    _ < N * δ := hN
    _ ≤ n * δ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (by exact_mod_cast hn) (le_of_lt hδ₁)
    _ = δ * n := mul_comm _ _

rw [one_div_div] at hN
  calc
    2 * (b - a) / n ≤ 2 * (b - a) / N := div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by linarith) NposR (Nat.cast_le.mpr hn)
    _ < δ := (div_lt_iff NposR).mpr ((div_lt_iff hδ₁).mp hN)

rw [one_div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound)]
  calc
    2 * (b - a) < ↑N * δ := (div_lt_iff hδ₁).mp hN
    _ ≤ ↑n * δ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (Nat.cast_le.mpr hn) (le_of_lt hδ₁)
    _ = δ * ↑n := mul_comm _ _

rw [div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound)]
  apply lt_of_lt_of_le hN
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right
  · exact_mod_cast hn
  · exact hδ₁.le

rw [one_div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound), mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le hN (by exact_mod_cast hn)

rw [one_div, inv_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound)]
  calc
    2 * (b - a) < ↑N * δ := (div_lt_iff hδ₁).mp hN
    _ ≤ ↑n * δ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (Nat.cast_le.mpr hn) (le_of_lt hδ₁)

field_simp at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound), mul_comm]
  exact hN.trans_le (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (Nat.cast_le.2 hn) hδ₁.le)

rw [one_div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff npos, mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]

rw [div_div, one_mul] at hN

    _ ≤ n * δ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (Nat.cast_le.mpr hn) (le_of_lt hδ₁)

rw [one_div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound), mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le hN (by exact_mod_cast hn)

rw [div_div, one_mul] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound)]
  calc 2 * (b - a) < ↑N * δ := (div_lt_iff hδ₁).mp hN
    _ = δ * ↑N := mul_comm _ _
    _ ≤ δ * ↑n := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (Nat.cast_le.mpr hn) (le_of_lt hδ₁)

rw [div_lt_iff (by bound)]
  rw [one_div_div, div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  calc

    _ ≤ n * δ := by apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (by exact_mod_cast hn) (by bound)

rw [div_div] at hN

  calc 2 * (b - a)
